indications.text: The American species Muscari comosum (Mill.) (Feather Hyacinth), or Purse Tassel, has been used, as well as other species of Muscari , for its diuretic and stimulant properties. Comisic acid has been extracted from the bulb, and apparently acts like Saponin. The innumerable varieties of Garden Hyacinth are derived from an Eastern plant, Hyacinthus orientalis . [ Top ]
